crons.comment: Daily at midnight UTC. Generates 20 AI events via Gemini. Internal 4h guard prevents redundant runs.
Daily at 6am UTC. Polls RSS feeds and analyzes with Gemini AI.
Daily at 8am UTC. Refreshes forex pair data from Twelve Data.
Daily at 10am UTC. USGS earthquake feed — no API key required.
Daily at noon UTC. NASA EONET wildfire data.
Daily at 2pm UTC. Open-Meteo Air Quality — refreshes one zone per call.
Daily at 4pm UTC. Open-Meteo wind + temperature data.
Daily at 6pm UTC. Open-Meteo Marine sea surface temperature.
Daily at 2am UTC. Purges expired events and stale cache data.
